name: Low-Calorie Buttermilk Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, mix the cottage cheese until smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and blend until combined.
3. Makes about 3 cups dressing for green salads.
4. Will keep in refrigerator for 2 weeks.
5. Nutrition Analysis per serving: 18 calories; 3 grams protein; 1 gram carbohydrate; trace fat; 110 milligrams sodium; 1 milligram cholesterol.
6. Serving Size: 2 Tablespoons
